requirement_topic.en: EMC and Wireless Module Approval — Anatel Homologation (applicable only if wireless/radio module integrated)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线模块认证 — Anatel 型号核准（仅适用于集成无线/射频模块的产品）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無線模組認證 — Anatel 型號核准（僅適用於整合無線/射頻模組的產品）

summary.en: Any BESS that incorporates a wireless communications module (Wi-Fi, cellular/LTE/5G, Zigbee, LoRa, Bluetooth, or other radio technology) for monitoring, remote control, or BMS telemetry must obtain Anatel (Agência Nacional de Telecomunicações) homologation for that radio module before the product can be legally placed on the Brazilian market. Anatel homologation is governed by Resolução Anatel 715/2019 and subsequent Acts (Atos) that define conformity assessment procedures and technical requirements per product category. BESS PCS/inverters that include an onboard wireless interface fall under Anatel's scope as Produtos para Telecomunicações (telecommunications products). If the wireless module is a separately homologated third-party module already listed in Anatel's homologated product database (MOSAICO), the system integrator may be able to rely on the module's existing homologation provided the installation meets Anatel rules — verify with an accredited Brazilian OCD (Organismo de Certificação Designado) before claiming module-level coverage. EMC emissions requirements for the non-radio portions of the BESS (conducted and radiated emissions) are referenced via ABNT NBR CISPR standards aligned with CISPR 11 (industrial equipment emissions).
summary.zh: 任何包含无线通信模块（Wi-Fi、蜂窝/LTE/5G、Zigbee、LoRa、蓝牙或其他无线电技术）用于监控、远程控制或 BMS 遥测的 BESS，在合法进入巴西市场前，须取得 Anatel（国家电信局）对该无线模块的型号核准。Anatel 型号核准由 Anatel 第 715/2019 号决议及后续文件（Acts/Atos）规范，按产品类别规定合规评估程序及技术要求。内置无线接口的 BESS PCS/逆变器作为电信产品（Produtos para Telecomunicações）受 Anatel 管辖。若无线模块为已列入 Anatel 型号核准产品数据库（MOSAICO）的独立核准第三方模块，且安装符合 Anatel 规则，系统集成商或可依托该模块的现有核准——在主张模块级覆盖前，请向巴西认可 OCD（指定认证机构）核实。BESS 非无线电部分（传导和辐射发射）的电磁兼容发射要求参照与 CISPR 11（工业设备发射）对应的 ABNT NBR CISPR 标准。
summary.zht: 任何包含無線通信模組（Wi-Fi、蜂窩/LTE/5G、Zigbee、LoRa、藍牙或其他無線電技術）用於監控、遠程控制或 BMS 遙測的 BESS，在合法進入巴西市場前，須取得 Anatel（國家電信局）對該無線模組的型號核准。Anatel 型號核准由 Anatel 第 715/2019 號決議及後續文件（Acts/Atos）規範，按產品類別規定合規評估程序及技術要求。內置無線接口的 BESS PCS/逆變器作為電信產品（Produtos para Telecomunicações）受 Anatel 管轄。若無線模組為已列入 Anatel 型號核准產品資料庫（MOSAICO）的獨立核准第三方模組，且安裝符合 Anatel 規則，系統集成商或可依托該模組的現有核准——在主張模組級覆蓋前，請向巴西認可 OCD（指定認證機構）核實。BESS 非無線電部分（傳導和輻射發射）的電磁相容發射要求參照與 CISPR 11（工業設備發射）對應的 ABNT NBR CISPR 標準。

standards_or_laws: Anatel Resolução 715/2019 — Regulamento de Avaliação da Conformidade e de Homologação de Produtos para Telecomunicações

ABNT NBR CISPR 11 — Equipamentos industriais, científicos e médicos (ISM) — Características de perturbação de radiofrequência (Brazilian adoption of CISPR 11; exact edition — verify with ABNT catalog)

summary.en: In China, radio frequency (RF) equipment must be type-approved by MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology) via SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval. BESS systems with wireless monitoring modules additionally require CNAS EMC lab testing to GB/T 17626 (EMC immunity) and GB/T 9254 / GB 4343 (emissions) series standards. CCC (3C) certification for radio transmission equipment under MIIT is distinct from Anatel homologation and is not recognised in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电频率（RF）设备须通过工业和信息化部（MIIT）由国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）进行无线电型号核准。带无线监控模块的 BESS 系统还须在 CNAS 认可 EMC 实验室按 GB/T 17626（电磁兼容抗扰度）及 GB/T 9254/GB 4343（发射）系列标准进行测试。MIIT 针对无线电发射设备的 CCC（3C）认证与 Anatel 型号核准性质不同，在巴西不被认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電頻率（RF）設備須通過工業和信息化部（MIIT）由國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）進行無線電型號核准。帶無線監控模組的 BESS 系統還須在 CNAS 認可 EMC 實驗室按 GB/T 17626（電磁相容抗擾度）及 GB/T 9254/GB 4343（發射）系列標準進行測試。MIIT 針對無線電發射設備的 CCC（3C）認證與 Anatel 型號核准性質不同，在巴西不被認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval (MIIT — State Radio Regulation of China) — mandatory for wireless devices in China
GB/T 9254 — 信息技术设备的无线电骚扰限值和测量方法 (EMC emissions for IT equipment)
GB/T 17626 series — 电磁兼容 试验和测量技术 (EMC immunity test and measurement methods)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio type approval and MIIT/CCC wireless certification are not accepted by Anatel. Any wireless module embedded in a Chinese BESS must obtain a separate Anatel homologation before the product can legally enter the Brazilian market. If using a third-party module already homologated by Anatel, verify module-level coverage rules with a Brazilian OCD. EMC test reports from Chinese CNAS labs to GB/T standards are not automatically accepted for ABNT NBR CISPR compliance — testing at an INMETRO/Anatel-recognised laboratory may be required.
gap.zh: 中国 SRRC 无线电型号核准及 MIIT/CCC 无线认证不被 Anatel 接受。中国 BESS 中内置的任何无线模块须另行取得 Anatel 型号核准，方可合法进入巴西市场。若使用已经 Anatel 核准的第三方模块，请向巴西 OCD 核实模块级覆盖规则。来自中国 CNAS 实验室基于 GB/T 标准的电磁兼容测试报告不被自动接受为 ABNT NBR CISPR 合规依据——可能须在 INMETRO/Anatel 认可实验室进行测试。
gap.zht: 中國 SRRC 無線電型號核准及 MIIT/CCC 無線認證不被 Anatel 接受。中國 BESS 中內置的任何無線模組須另行取得 Anatel 型號核准，方可合法進入巴西市場。若使用已經 Anatel 核准的第三方模組，請向巴西 OCD 核實模組級覆蓋規則。來自中國 CNAS 實驗室基於 GB/T 標準的電磁相容測試報告不被自動接受為 ABNT NBR CISPR 合規依據——可能須在 INMETRO/Anatel 認可實驗室進行測試。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Anatel homologation is mandatory ONLY IF the BESS integrates a wireless/radio/telecom module (Wi-Fi, cellular, Zigbee, LoRa, Bluetooth, etc.); a BESS with no integrated radio transmission capability is not subject to Anatel homologation. No confirmed general BESS EMC compulsory certification route (separate from Anatel) has been verified for non-radio BESS emissions — ABNT NBR CISPR limits may apply as project or installation specification. Verify with a Brazilian OCD whether the specific BESS configuration triggers Anatel scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval and applicable CCC/MIIT certification required for wireless devices in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — CONDITIONAL] Anatel homologation applies ONLY if the BESS integrates a wireless/radio/telecom module. A BESS with no integrated radio capability is not subject to Anatel homologation; no confirmed general BESS EMC compulsory certification route has been verified for non-radio BESS. Where wireless modules are present: Chinese SRRC or MIIT/CCC wireless approvals are not accepted by Anatel. Verify whether the module is already Anatel-homologated via the MOSAICO database; if not, budget 3–6 months for homologation through a Brazilian OCD before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考——有条件适用] Anatel 型号核准仅适用于集成无线/射频/电信模块的 BESS。无集成无线模块的 BESS 不受 Anatel 型号核准约束；针对无无线模块 BESS 的通用强制 EMC 认证路径亦未获确认。如存在无线模块：中国 SRRC 或 MIIT/CCC 无线认证不被 Anatel 接受。请通过 MOSAICO 数据库核查无线模块是否已取得 Anatel 核准；若未核准，须在发货前通过巴西 OCD 预留 3 至 6 个月用于型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考——有條件適用] Anatel 型號核准僅適用於整合無線/射頻/電信模組的 BESS。無整合無線模組的 BESS 不受 Anatel 型號核准約束；針對無無線模組 BESS 的通用強制 EMC 認證路徑亦未獲確認。如存在無線模組：中國 SRRC 或 MIIT/CCC 無線認證不被 Anatel 接受。請通過 MOSAICO 資料庫核查無線模組是否已取得 Anatel 核准；若未核准，須在發貨前通過巴西 OCD 預留 3 至 6 個月用於型號核准。
